violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The gasket on the white fridge under the hot holding counter is broken. Handle of the chest freezer but the compressor in the back storage room is broken with duct tape on it.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. A coupe fan guards for the cooling unit in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats on the stainless steel counter by the pizza ovens were not inverted.
